---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Before you file (read once)

- **Ideas from using the product?** The in-app **feedback widget** (feature / general types) sends structured input to **Admin → Feedback** for triage. See [docs/FEEDBACK_AND_ISSUES.md](../../docs/FEEDBACK_AND_ISSUES.md).
- **Proposals for this open-source codebase** (API shape, architecture, contributor workflow): this GitHub template is the right place — link [`docs/ROADMAP.md`](../../docs/ROADMAP.md) if relevant.

## Problem or opportunity

What user or maintainer pain does this address?

## Proposed direction

High-level approach (implementation can follow in discussion).

## Alternatives considered

## Links

Related issues or roadmap sections.
